interface.shortDescription: Lightweight state-backed task stages for Codex.
interface.longDescription: my-cc-lite adds a minimal staged workflow for init, plan, do, verify, and archive while keeping task state local and readable.
defaultPrompt: Use my-cc-lite to initialize this project and capture the project summary.
Help me plan the current task with my-cc-lite and write the plan into local state.
Run the my-cc-lite do and verify workflow for the active task.
